headline: Comcast Business Unveils Innovation Lab, Collaborating with Global Technology Leaders to Scale Next-Gen Enterprise Solutions
summary: PHILADELPHIA, April 16, 2026--Comcast Business, one of the fastest growing enterprise technology providers, today announced the launch of the Comcast Business Innovation Lab, a dedicated environment where Comcast Business, its customers, and leading technology partners co-develop, test, and scale enterprise solutions.

headline: Goldman Sachs Raises Dell Price Target to $215: Is This AI Server Powerhouse Still the Best Value in Tech?
summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) stock is getting a raised price target from Goldman Sachs, which lifted its target on Dell to $215 from $195 while maintaining a Buy rating. The move signals Wall Street sees more runway ahead even after DELL stock has already surged 49% year to date. For long-term investors, the revised target reflects ... headline: Corning Stock Is Falling. Why J.P. Morgan Disagrees With the ‘Blue-Sky Scenario.’
summary: Shares of  Corning  declined Thursday after  J.P. Morgan  analysts downgraded the artificial-intelligence beneficiary with the firm cautious heading into earnings.  A J.P. Morgan analyst team, led by Samik Chatterjee, downgraded  Corning  to Neutral from Overweight.  The firm, however, raised its price target on Corning stock to $175 from $115.
